descriptionEn: Nahum predicts in his book (3:7) the fall of Nineveh, the Assyrian capital. His prophecy takes place at the peak of Assyrian power, probably around 50 years earlier.

verses.line: And it shall come to pass, that all they that look upon thee shall flee from thee, and say, Nineveh is laid waste: who will bemoan her? whence shall I seek comforters for thee?
